---
pagetitle: "Writing"
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents:
      - "posts/*/index.qmd"
      - "posts/*/index.ipynb"
      - "tutorials/on-policy-distillation/index.qmd"
      - "!posts/llm-providers-structured-output/index.ipynb"
      - "!posts/py-cuda-kernel/index.ipynb"
      - "!posts/tgi-litellm-openai/index.ipynb"
      - "!posts/fastai-huggingface-datasets/index.ipynb"
      - "!posts/fastai-custom-model/index.ipynb"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: custom
    template: _postlist.ejs
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
    fields: [title, date, categories, path]
---

## Publications

::: {.pub}
**MSc Thesis** — *Knowledge Graph Augmented Multi-Hop Question Answering Using Large Language
Models*. METU, 2024. [Open archive](https://open.metu.edu.tr/handle/11511/111317)
:::

## Posts

::: {#posts}
:::

[Archive →](archive.html){.more}
